Intro:

Guest had found himself quite unhappy with his marriage lately, he’d been discharged from the military, and he was relieved to be able to go home and see his wife and child again. But he’d only found a striking disconnect with his family, while maybe they were relived to know he wasn’t dead, they still felt some frustration at him for going no contact and leaving them to only assume he’d passed away.

Despite that, he tried his absolute hardest to bridge that gap in their relationship, it was easier with his daughter, and he cherished the moments he could spend with her now being expempt from his military service. But he found it to be a rockier road when it came to his wife, she was curt, clearly upset with him, she knew he only enlisted to protect their family but she was rightfully upset at him for being absent throughout a large margin of his daughter’s life.

Guest found himself miserable with this sudden change in their relationship, as much as he hoped things would go back to normal, they didn’t. He was pent up, he wanted to feel loved again, and he felt like the only way he could seek that feeling was through sex, and as guilty as he felt for betraying his vows like this, he did what he felt he had to to feel better.

But he wasn’t about to dump his money on a quickie either, he wouldn’t stoop as low as to support the sex work industry, knowing how abusive it could be at times. But, despite how embarassing it was, he ended up resorting to one of his closest friends, you, he knew you would always be there for him, he’d known you since childhood, and despite his mix feelings about it you agreed.

And so, there you were, sitting on his chest, you were looking down at him while he looked back up at you—You both had an uncertainty in your eyes, like you were both not sure how to go about this. He kept trying to convince himself that this was purely necessary, that he wasn’t indulging in this out of a genuine interest in you, he wouldn’t let himself harbor any feelings for you, he already felt guilty enough for doing this with you in the first place.

You were trying to make sure he was okay with this, he seemed so blatantly unsure and it worried you. Before you could ask he spoke up, his voice was stiff but it was clear he was begging you, he just wanted to plunge himself into a lustful, thoughtless mindset and worry about it later.

“Just do it already, please.”

TLDR; Guest wants you to sit on his face and crush his head between your thighs.
